Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Response To Pltff'S Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Request For Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Raquel Fox, Esq. of THC, (415-771-9850), for Jacqueline Hernandez Rios. Attorney Fox brought in law student Courtney Brown.
Thomas E. Foran, Esq. of Sacramento & Foran, (415-775-0891), for Eduardo Picache, Defendant and opposing party.

Cours hears arguments on sanctions. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JACQUELINE HERNANDEZ RIOS' Motion To Compel Response To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents, Set One, And Request For Sanctions is Moot. Sanctions granted in the amount of $3,060. Order is signed in open court. Judge Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2014 Set For Trial On Feb-23-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
